generator: openai/gpt-image-2/edit via FAL; no post-processing; product-reference-driven
creative_rule: one complete product photoshoot; same serum explored through multiple product-photo worlds and detail shots; minimal/no overlay text

slides.prompt:
Create ONE square 1:1 image for a visual-first Thai product Prompt Drop carousel.
Use the attached product photo as the product reference. Preserve the same product identity as much as possible: small amber glass skincare serum dropper bottle, black rubber dropper and black cap, white label with orange Vitamin C / brighten accent, compact 10 ml serum shape. Keep the product recognizable and label facing camera when possible.

This is a premium product photoshoot carousel, not an infographic. Do not add ugly headline overlays. Do not add big social-media text. Do not add random labels, fake logos, watermarks, stickers, or extra packaging text. Any typography must be only the product label itself or extremely subtle campaign-like microtext if unavoidable.

Style: high-end commercial product photography for Thai skincare/e-commerce. Strong visual composition, beautiful lighting, realistic shadows/reflections, artistic but sellable. The image should wow people by showing how far AI product photography can push one simple product.

Slide 1 / Hero shot: Vitamin C citrus glow campaign. Place the amber serum bottle upright on a warm cream stone pedestal, label visible, with fresh orange slices, curled orange peel, tiny dew droplets, and warm morning sunlight beams. Clean premium skincare ad composition, orange glow connecting to the label accent, shallow depth of field, expensive but natural. No added typography.
